title: Daily report
excerpt: Anyone have a solution for getting a daily report emailed with each user’s to do list for that day? I need the list to be in the email, not an attachment.

posts.author: spincus (Sara Pincus)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone have a solution for getting a daily report emailed with each user’s to do list for that day? I need the list to be in the email, not an attachment.

posts.author: MASO (Markus @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sara,

You might wanna give Spreadsheet Gorilla a try for your use case. Watch the video below to follow the steps:

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @spincus , what do you mean by todo list here, do you mean items which are shown in My Work for each person or something else ?

posts.author: spincus (Sara Pincus)
posts.cookedHtml: @YashGarg I mean items which are assigned in My Work, sent in an email to each assignee
